evidence_summary.implemented: HermesGate optional field registry binds matter_id, blocked_claim_refs, and human_approval_refs as optional fields while preserving nullable firm-level Matter trace and reference-only HumanApproval boundaries.
evidence_summary.tests: Model tests and the RP00 control-plane validator execute optional field registry policy, absent optional field acceptance, invalid optional value rejection, and synthetic fixture optional record validation.

evidence_summary.human_approval_boundary: Human approval remains non-delegable; optional human_approval_refs are reference-only and cannot approve, replace, or modify human approval decisions.
